issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards attached to your leader), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! as separate entities). Card text says 'DON!! cards on your field' which refers to attached DON!!.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Draw 1 card if you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field.
